a_image.alt: GSAP-Powered Interactions style mood board — Heavy Motion · GSAP

sections.a_eyebrow: Advanced JS · Animation · Heavy Motion · Interactive · Modern
sections.a_description: Buttery-smooth timelines, sophisticated easing curves, and the premium polish of agency-grade animation — GSAP-Powered Interactions design represents the highest tier of web animation craftsmanship. The deep emerald accents and warm off-white backgrounds create a sophisticated stage, while every transition, stagger, and scroll-linked animation is timed with the precision that only GSAP's timeline engine enables.

This animation-forward style powers award-winning agency portfolios, luxury brand experiences, interactive storytelling sites, and premium product launches. You'll see it on Awwwards-winning sites, creative studio homepages, fashion brand campaigns, and automotive microsites — anywhere that justifies the investment in hand-crafted, timeline-driven animation that transforms browsing into a choreographed experience.

a_image_cover.alt: GSAP-Powered Interactions style use case illustration
GSAP-Powered Interactions style use case illustration
GSAP-Powered Interactions style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The polished, agency-grade aesthetic of GSAP-powered websites — buttery-smooth timeline animations, sophisticated easing, and interactions that feel premium and intentional. Background: off-white (#f5f5f0) with a warm, premium feel. The .inner panel has a white background (#ffffff) with a subtle shadow (0 2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)) and 12px border-radius — the clean canvas for choreographed GSAP timelines. Colors: deep emerald (#059669) as the primary accent — sophisticated, premium, and associated with high-end interactive agencies. Near-black (#111827) for headings, warm gray (#6b7280) for body text. The aesthetic is agency-polished — every animation feels deliberate, every transition timed to perfection. Set in Manrope — a modern geometric sans-serif with subtle optical corrections, popular among high-end web studios. Heading at weight 700, 28px, line-height 1.2, letter-spacing -0.5px, color #111827. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 2px letter-spacing, color #059669. Body at weight 400, 15px, line-height 1.7, color #6b7280. Buttons: primary — emerald (#059669), white text, 8px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, emerald border. Alternatives: General Sans (modern geometric), Clash Display (bold display).
